---
title: "Lisa DeBruine"
---

Courses

* [The Research Cycle](research_cycle/)
* [Academic Webpages](acadweb/)

Shiny Apps

* [topcentile](http://rstudio2.psy.gla.ac.uk/debruine/topcentile/)  

    This tool calculates the ratio of group A and group B members above a 
    specificed percentile. You set the means and standard deviations for groups 
    A and B (only normal distributions for now).

I also blog random things about R and Open Science.

<<<<<<< HEAD
* [psych::alpha()](psych_alpha.html)
=======
* [psych::alpha()](psych_alpha.html)
>>>>>>> ad7eb9af5a3e764936ac2aab0f9d4f5d448b57e7
* [rep()](rep.html)
* [scale()](scale.html)
* [coding schemes](coding.html)
* [pca](pca.html)
* [recode()](recode.html)
* [cumulative p](cumulative_p.html)
